package.name: go2_warehouse_transport
package.description: Go2 warehouse autonomous transport and fixed-point placement. Simulation of a warehouse scenario: a Go2 dog-style mobile base navigates to pickup shelves, picks a payload, transports it across the floor, and drops it at a target staging area. Built on the same TCP/Nav2 bridge pattern as go2_navigation, extended with a three-phase state machine (PICKUP -> TRANSPORT -> PLACE).
